name: Click Space Miner 2
short_description: In Click Space Miner II you take control over a mining company in space. There is a big market, a lot of customers, but therefore also a lot of concurrents so you have to mine fast.
detailed_description:
REVIEW:
MIXER GAMES presents "Click Space Miner II," where you become the commander of a space mining company. With a vast market and numerous customers, competition is fierce, requiring you to mine quickly. Extract all the valuable resources from the planet and unlock over 30 achievements along the way.



Quickly click your way to riches in this resource mining game. Use your mouse to mine resources at a rapid pace, allowing you to purchase advanced tools and machines that do the work for you. As you earn more money, your wealth will grow. However, be mindful of your high management expenses and don't overlook the importance of renewing your mining licenses. These licenses are in high demand, and if you delay, you risk losing everything.



Your mouse is your key tool in this game. Utilize it for mining resources and constructing new tools.

Acquire improved drills to extract resources and increase your earnings at a faster rate.
Visit the G-shop to purchase automated tools that generate raw materials automatically for you.


*Advertising may be included in the Free to Play version. As well as purchase recommendations for various products.
There is no purchase obligation.*
